title: Lead Investment Banker at Bajaj Allianz Life South Asia Partners
company: Bajaj Allianz Life South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at Bajaj Allianz Life South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Bajaj Allianz Life South Asia Partners invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Investment Banker at our Surat location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Bajaj Allianz Life South Asia Partners:
Bajaj Allianz Life South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Allianz Life South Asia Partners!
